titles.title: Kareem N. Dockery Medal of Honor Act
Nicholas Dockery Medal of Honor Act
Nicholas Dockery Medal of Honor Act
Nicholas Dockery Medal of Honor Act
Nicholas Dockery Medal of Honor Act
To authorize the President to award the Medal of Honor to Kareem N. Dockery for acts of valor as a member of the Army while serving in Afghanistan.
To authorize the President to award the Medal of Honor to Nicholas Dockery for acts of valor as a member of the Army while serving in Afghanistan
To authorize the President to award the Medal of Honor to Nicholas Dockery for acts of valor as a member of the Army while serving in Afghanistan.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Armed Services.
Mr. Bacon asked unanimous consent to discharge from committee and consider.

reference.label: text of amendment in the nature of a substitute

action.text: Motion to reconsider laid on the table Agreed to without objection.
The title of the measure was amended. Agreed to without objection.
Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Armed Services.
Senate Committee on Armed Services discharged by Unanimous Consent.

vote.text: Passed Senate without amendment by Unanimous Consent.

action.text: Message on Senate action sent to the House.
